title: cotula pedicellata
intro: Cotula pedicellata, also known as Bitter Buttons or Bittercress, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Cotula pedicellata are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the digestive system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
